title: Mellow Earthy Spanish Fish Paella
description: A hearty and earthy Spanish dish featuring fish, nam pla fish sauce, and infused oil, perfect for a post-workout meal. This Buddhist-temple-friendly recipe is free from animal products and by-products.
instructions: Heat the infused oil in a large paella pan or skillet over medium heat.
Add the cubed tofu and cook until golden brown, about 5 minutes.
Add the mixed vegetables and cook until they start to soften, about 3 minutes.
Add the smoked paprika, saffron threads, and sea salt, and stir to combine.
Add the brown rice and stir to combine with the vegetable mixture.
Add the water and nam pla fish sauce, and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer for 20 minutes.
Remove the paella from the heat and let it rest for 5 minutes.
Serve the paella hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
